name: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc.

bear: Trend rolling over — spot $227.55 sits -1.9% relative to the 200-DMA ($231.89). The break-down of long-term trend often precedes earnings disappointment by 1–2 quarters as smart-money distribution leads the fundamental print.

Valuation premium — 42.0x forward P/E vs peer median of 20.0x — a 110% premium. The setup requires continued out-execution to maintain; any reversion to peer-median multiples compresses the stock meaningfully even before any earnings revision.
trigger_up: Revenue growth re-accelerates above 28% YoY on next print — confirms the demand environment hasn't degraded into the back half.

trigger_down: Revenue growth decelerates below 22% YoY — signals demand has materially softened versus the latest disclosed run-rate.
